title: Israel the main obstacle to stability in Syria, envoy warns as Security Council reviews transition

snapshot.title: Israel the main obstacle to stability in Syria, envoy warns as Security Council reviews transition
snapshot.description: NEW YORK CITY: The main obstacle to stability in Syria is Israel, the country’s envoy to the UN told the Security Council, as he also accused the Israeli prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, of undermining a US-brokered deal to end the war with Iran. It came as senior UN officials described the political transition in Syria as caught between fragile progress and persistent
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel the main obstacle to stability in Syria, envoy warns as Security Council reviews transition | Arab News
